zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert Umfraville於1195年出生在英國諾圖恩布利亞時，他的父親Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale32歲，母親Margaret de Balliol28歲。他於1243年與Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu在英國諾圖波藍德普盧多結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1230年登記服兵役。他去世於1244年在英國英格蘭享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德可哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert Umfraville于1195年出生在英国諾圖恩布利亞时，他的父亲Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale32岁，母亲Margaret de Balliol28岁。他于1243年与Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu在英国諾圖波藍德普盧多结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1230年登记服兵役。他去世于1244年在英国英格兰享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德可哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Umfraville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert Umfraville was born in 1195, in Northumbria, England, his father, Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale, was 32 and his mother, Margaret de Balliol, was 28. He married Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu in 1243, in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He registered for military service in 1230. He died in 1244, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Hexham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert Umfraville est né en 1195, à Northumbria, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Balliol, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu en 1243, à Prudhoe, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1230. Il est décédé en 1244, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Hexham, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert Umfraville 1195 in Northumbria, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale 32 und seine Mutter Margaret de Balliol 28. Er hat 1243 in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er hat sich 1230 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1244 im Alter von 49 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hexham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Umfraville è nato il nel 1195 nel Northumbria, England, il suo padre, Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Balliol, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu nel 1243, nel Prudhoe, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1230. Morì nel 1244, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Hexham, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Umfravilleが1195年にイギリスノースウンブリアで生まれた時，父Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdaleは32歳，母Margaret de Balliolは28歳であった。1243年にイギリスノースウンバーランドプルドhオでMatilda de Angus Countess of Anguと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1230年に兵役登録をした。彼は1244年にイギリスイギリスで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドヘクスハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Umfraville(이)가 1195년 영국 노르스브리아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Balliol(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1243년 영국 노르스벌랜드 플루드호에서 Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1230년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1244년 영국 잉글랜드에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 헤스함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Umfraville nasceu em 1195, em Northumbria, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Balliol, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu em 1243, em Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1230. Ele faleceu em 1244, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Hexham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert Umfraville родился в 1195 г. в местности нортумбря, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Balliol, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu в 1243 г. в местности прудхо, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. В 1230 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1244 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности хексхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert Umfraville nació en 1195, en Northumbria, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret de Balliol, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu en 1243, en Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1230. Murió en 1244, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Hexham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
